input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.2.5.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.2.5.4
            TITLE: with an upright driving position:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.2.5.4: With an Upright Driving Position:
T.2.5.4 With an Upright Driving Position:  
a. The Lap Belt Side View Angle must be between 45° and 65° to the horizontal.  
b. The centerline of the Lap Belt at the seat bottom should be between 0 – 75 mm forward 
of the seat back to seat bottom junction.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 60 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: T.2.5.4 With an Upright Driving Position: a. The Lap Belt Side View Angle must be between 45° and 65° to the horizontal. b. The centerline of the Lap Belt at the seat bottom should be between 0 – 75 mm forward of the seat back to seat bottom junction.
